shot_type_and_framing: medium close-up with the jewelry tray centered and placed in the lower two-thirds of the frame, capturing the jewelry pieces and perfume bottle clearly
camera_movement: slow push-in toward the marble tray and the objects on it
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a moderate focal length around 50mm, shallow depth of field softly blurring the background
environment_description: minimalistic indoor setting on a light wood surface with a neutral beige wall background, featuring a wooden framed mirror on the left and a ribbed terracotta vase with green plant leaves on the right
subject_description: a rectangular white marble tray with rounded corners and small golden spherical feet, holding various gold jewelry including bangles, rings, and pearl earrings, alongside a small glass perfume bottle with a translucent cap containing amber-colored liquid
motion_behavior: camera moves steadily and smoothly with natural physics, capturing subtle reflections on the jewelry and glass surface
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, realistic, premium, filmic with warm and soft natural textures and colors
